blocks.title: Earthquake in Haiti
blocks.description: The 7.2-magnitude earthquake struck at 8:29 a.m. EST, Aug. 14, 2021.
blocks.notes:
Note: A shakemap represents the ground shaking produced by an earthquake.

Source: USGIS
blocks.aria: A map that shows the shake intensity of the earthquake, which was worst in central Haiti.
